name: Diabetic Glorified Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 can (20 oz.) Crushed Pineapple, in its own juice
1 Cup Pineapple Juice, drained from can
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to package directions. Drain and set aside.
2. Drain the pineapple, reserving 1 cup of juice.
3. Dissolve gelatin in 1 cup boiling water.
4. Add the reserved pineapple juice. Stir until well combined.
5. Mix in the drained rice. The cooked rice will absorb the color and flavor of the gelatin.
6. Chill until thickened but not quite set.
7. Add the drained pineapple and cherries, if desired.
8. Fold in whipped cream.
9. Chill.
